name: Fixing Motion Performance
description: Diagnose and fix animation performance issues — jank, layout thrash, and motion that fights the main thread.

install.cursor: npx skills add ibelick/ui-skills --skill fixing-motion-performance -a cursor -g -y
install.claude: npx skills add ibelick/ui-skills --skill fixing-motion-performance -a claude-code -g -y
install.codex: npx skills add ibelick/ui-skills --skill fixing-motion-performance -a codex -g -y
